_meta.source: starfi5h/AlchemyFactoryCalculator develop branch, alchemy_calc_engine.js (DB v41, gameVersion 0.5.0.4471)
_meta.note: These are the five production-affecting upgrade tracks modeled by the community calculator, with formulas extracted verbatim from its engine code. Community guides name additional skills (e.g. Catapult Speed, Commerce) that are NOT modeled here; no authoritative datamined skill-tree dump exists yet. Verified against the live calculator 2026-06-12.

tracks.name: Factory Efficiency (Machine Speed)
tracks.affects: all machine crafting speed (divides recipe baseTime); also multiplies machine heat consumption per second (net heat per batch unchanged)

tracks.name: Alchemy Skill (Batch Yield)
tracks.affects: batch yield multiplier, ONLY for: Extractor, Thermal Extractor, Alembic, Advanced Alembic. Thermal Extractor additionally gets a fixed 3x yield on top of this multiplier.
tracks.formula: alchemyMult(lvl) = 1.0 + sum_{i=1..lvl}(p_i)/100 where p_i = 6 for i<=2, 8 for 3<=i<=8, 10 for i>=9

tracks.name: Fuel Efficiency
tracks.affects: heat energy extracted per fuel item burned

tracks.name: Fertilizer Efficiency
tracks.affects: nutrient value extracted per fertilizer item consumed

notModeled: Catapult Speed (named in community guides; no formula source found)
Commerce (named in community guides; no formula source found)
full skill tree layout, level caps, and unlock costs
